{{Quote|My master is the honorable Pann! Respected throughout the galaxy for his wisdom and chivalry!|[[Q4P3]]|<ref name="ToOW" />}}
'''Pann''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
Discovered to be [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], Pann was taken to the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] and [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] at the [[Jedi academy|Temple's academy]] in the Jedi arts. Selected as a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], Pann eventually passed his [[Jedi Trials/Legends|Trials of Knighthood]] and was made a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] by the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]]. During his studies, Jedi Pann became fascinated with the mysterious [[Codex]], an ancient artifact created centuries in the past. Employing a [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] named [[Q4P3]] to assist in his search, the droid wandered far and wide on its quest. Meanwhile, the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] erupted between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].<ref name="ToOW" />

Reporting to Coruscant, Pann served in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] as a [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] fighting on many fronts until the end of the war when the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] came to power and disbanded the Jedi Order and the Republic. Escaping the horrors of the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]] with his life, Pann went underground in hopes that Q4P3 would return with the Codex. Having been drawn to the volcanic world of [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]] as of [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]], the droid eventually did locate the artifact and took it back to Pann for study. After a great deal of time and effort, Pann came to understand a few of its functions before it left his possession.<ref name="ToOW" />

==Behind the scenes==
Pann was created as a character example to illustrate an adventure idea in the ''[[Star Wars Gamemaster Handbook]]''. His existence in-universe remained unclear until it was confirmed by ''Trials of Obi-Wan'', the third expansion to ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''.
